articles.title: ITALY SCALES BACK PLANS TO HIKE CRYPTO TAX RATE
articles.summary: Italy may reduce its proposed crypto capital gains tax increase from 42% to 28%. Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni's government is likely to accept the lower rate. The proposed 28% tax, down from the earlier 42% plan, still awaits review and approval by Italian lawmakers. It follows a recent increase to 26% in 2023.

articles.title: BHUTAN REACHES $1 BILLION IN BITCOIN HOLDINGS
articles.summary: Bhutan's Bitcoin holdings have surpassed $1 billion. Fueled by profits from Bitcoin mining powered by the country's hydropower resources, this milestone reflects a global trend of state-level Bitcoin adoption amid rising prices and favorable regulatory shifts.

articles.title: ETHEREUM RESEARCHERS RELEASE PLANS FOR THE PROPOSED BEAM CHAIN
articles.summary: The Beam Chain is a proposed overhaul of Ethereum's consensus layer that incorporates recent advances like MEV management, SNARKs, and quantum security to improve performance, censorship resistance, and staking efficiency. This redesign, planned for production by 2026, aims to address Ethereum's tech debt and kickstart a leap forward in security and functionality without altering the existing roadmap.

articles.title: COINBASE LAUNCHES COIN50
articles.summary: Coinbase worked alongside the Market Vector Index team to create and launch an index of the top 50 eligible crypto assets by market cap to trade as a perpetual future.

articles.title: EXPLORING THE FUTURE OF AI AGENTS IN CRYPTO
articles.summary: This report explores how autonomous AI agents are emerging as influential players in crypto, spotlighting innovative projects like Terminal of Truths and $GOAT and platforms like Virtuals Protocol and Daos.fun. While challenges remain, such as AI accuracy and blockchain integration, the rapid development hints at AI agents' transformative potential in the crypto economy.

articles.title: STABLECOINS: A QUIET REVOLUTION
articles.summary: Stablecoins, which now circulate over $160 billion, are transforming global finance by enabling real-time, borderless transactions that bypass traditional banking infrastructure. Despite regulatory and privacy concerns, they promise to modernize payments, enhance capital efficiency, and allow even small players to participate in global transactions. Governments are exploring their benefits for monetary control and financial transparency.

articles.title: COMMENTS ON ETHEREUM BEAM CHAIN TIMELINE
articles.summary: The Ethereum Beam Chain's five-year timeline demonstrates the complexity and caution required for upgrading Ethereum, given its large scale (~$60B TVL) and thousands of dependent applications. It includes major changes like 3-slot finality and chain snarkification demand thorough consensus, backward-compatible implementation, and extensive testing to avoid bugs or exploits that could impact millions of users.

articles.title: SOLANA APPS FLIP ETH APPS IN FEES GENERATED
articles.summary: Solana applications have now surpassed Ethereum in total revenue generated, a key indicator of ecosystem value creation, positioning Solana as the new leader.

articles.title: STABLECOIN SUPPLY REACHES ALL-TIME HIGH
articles.summary: Crypto stablecoin supply has reached ~$168B, marking a new all-time high.

articles.title: COINBASE WORKS WITH BRIDGE TO CONNECT BANK ACCOUNTS TO COINBASE WALLET
articles.summary: Coinbase Wallet, in partnership with Bridge, now offers free U.S. bank accounts, allowing users to easily link their bank accounts with their noncustodial wallets to enable on-chain transactions directly through the wallet app.

articles.title: KORBIT LAUNCHES SEND/RECEIVE FUNCTIONALITY TO/FROM BASE
articles.summary: Korbit, South Korea's first centralized exchange, has launched direct send/receive functionality for USDC and ETH on Base (Coinbase's L2).

articles.title: GENIUS GROUP TO ADOPT BITCOIN TREASURY RESERVE, BUY $120M BTC
articles.summary: Genius Group, an AI-driven education company, plans to invest $120 million in Bitcoin as its primary treasury asset.
